page: Amazon Web Services m8ib.32xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance belonging to the m8ib server family. It is powered by dedicated Intel processors utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 128 virtual CPUs mapped to 64 physical cores, with 2.0 threads per core, operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. It runs on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, which minimizes virtualization overhead to deliver consistent performance.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated graphics processing units. For external connectivity and storage access, the instance provides a high-speed baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps. There are zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this configuration.

Given its balanced compute-to-memory ratio and high-speed network interface, this instance is designed for workloads that require significant processing power and memory capacity without specialized hardware acceleration. Suitable workloads include enterprise applications, web serving, database management systems, and continuous integration and continuous delivery pipelines.
description: Amazon Web Services m8ib.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors running on the Nitro hypervisor. It features 128 vCPUs across 64 physical cores with a clock speed of 3.9 GHz, paired with 512.0 GB of system memory. This configuration maintains a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, allocating 4.0 GB of memory per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, but it offers a high baseline network bandwidth of 133 Gbps. This resource profile makes the m8ib.32xlarge highly suitable for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, database hosting, and CI/CD pipelines that require substantial compute capacity and high-speed networking without the need for local NVMe storage or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m8ib.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 Intel vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 133 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, optimized for enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel processors, balanced memory allocation, and high-speed baseline networking.

512.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio

Designed for enterprise applications, databases, and CI/CD pipelines
